name: conversations_messages_create
description: Send a message within an existing conversation.

parameters.name: content
parameters.description: Message content. For text: {"text": "..."}. For media: {"url": "...", "caption": "..."}. For location: {"latitude": ..., "longitude": ...}.

parameters.name: channelId
parameters.description: Specific channel ID to use. Uses the conversation's last used channel if omitted.

content.text: Thank you for your inquiry. We'll get back to you shortly.
Thank you for your inquiry. We'll get back to you shortly.
